query:
UPDATE milestones
            SET milestone_name = $1,
                description = $2,
                assigned_to_party_id = $3,
                due_date = $4,
                completion_criteria = $5,
                milestone_status = $6,
                completion_percentage = $7,
                payment_trigger_amount = $8,
                completed_at = $9,
                verified_by_party_id = $10,
                display_order = $11,
                updated_at = $12
            WHERE id = $13
